commands.repair_reason: - The remaining blockers are narrow and mechanical: gate fingerprint exposure, cover provider-auth drift paths, and update focused tests.; Needs attention: The diff still has a concrete security-boundary concern because config fingerprints can be included in non-admin health snapshots.; Review finding: [P1] Gate fingerprints on sensitive health snapshots — src/commands/health.ts:782-784 - [P2] Include provider auth... commands.review_summary:
Adds runtime-vs-disk gateway config drift diagnostics to health JSON/text output, optional fingerprint fields, and regression tests for health snapshots and reload write intent.

PR surface: Source +206, Tests +112. Total +318 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows the PR still opts every getHealthSnapshot call into fingerprints while current main caches and broadcasts non-sensitive health snapshots; the provider-auth gap is also clear from the top-level auth config types and reload planner.
commands.review_followup: - The remaining blockers are narrow and mechanical: gate fingerprint exposure, cover provider-auth drift paths, and update focused tests.
